referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Split hero with large headline and CTA block on the left, doctor image card on the right, plus small floating trust/metric overlays around the photo.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Modern sans display with strong weight, compact line-height on headline, and lighter supporting paragraph copy.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: Compact horizontal trust metric row under the hero, presented as three to four simple cards/chips.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Three-column service cards, each with a small icon, short title, and concise supportive text.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Alternating two-column feature rows: text block paired with photo/media panel, with one tinted panel to break rhythm.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Three testimonial cards with visible star treatment and patient attribution, laid out in a clean horizontal row.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Hero on white/tinted gradient, then white trust row, then soft-tint services block, then alternating white/tinted feature panels, then white testimonials, then darker footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Airy spacing with generous vertical padding and clear separation between section groups.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded pill buttons with solid primary fill and outlined secondary style.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Primary blue drives headings and CTA emphasis, mint accent appears in icons/highlights, and neutrals keep most backgrounds calm and bright.

sections.heading: Decades of experience, modern technology, and care that never feels rushed.
Everything from preventive visits to advanced restorative and cosmetic care.
